# komodo_stacks (Data Source)

Lists all Komodo stacks visible to the authenticated user.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "komodo_stacks" "all" {}

output "stack_names" {
  value = [for s in data.komodo_stacks.all.stacks : s.name]
}
```

## Schema

### Read-Only

- `stacks` (Attributes List) The list of stacks. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--stacks))

<a id="nestedatt--stacks"></a>
### Nested Schema for `stacks`

Read-Only:

- `auto_pull_enabled` (Boolean) Whether `compose pull` is run before every deploy.
- `auto_update_enabled` (Boolean) Whether the stack is automatically redeployed when newer images are found.
- `auto_update_scope` (String) How services are redeployed when `auto_update_enabled` is active. Either `"stack"` or `"service"`.
- `build` (Attributes) Build configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--stacks--build))
- `compose_cmd_wrapper` (String) A command prefix to wrap the compose command.
- `compose_cmd_wrapper_include` (List of String) Which compose subcommands get wrapped by `compose_cmd_wrapper`.
- `destroy_enforced` (Boolean) Whether `docker compose down` is run before `compose up`.
- `environment` (Attributes) Environment variable configuration written to an env file before deploying. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--stacks--environment))
- `extra_arguments` (List of String) Extra arguments appended to the compose/stack deploy command.
- `files` (Attributes) Compose file configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--stacks--files))
- `source` (Attributes) Source configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--stacks--source))
- `id` (String) The stack identifier (ObjectId).
- `ignore_services` (List of String) Services ignored when checking stack health status.
- `links` (List of String) Quick links displayed in the Komodo UI for this stack.
- `name` (String) The name of the stack.
- `poll_updates_enabled` (Boolean) Whether to poll for image updates.
- `post_deploy` (Attributes) Command to run after the stack is deployed. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--stacks--post_deploy))
- `pre_deploy` (Attributes) Command to run before the stack is deployed. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--stacks--pre_deploy))
- `project_name` (String) Custom project name for `docker compose -p`.
- `registry` (Attributes) Registry login configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--stacks--registry))
- `alerts_enabled` (Boolean) Whether stack-state-change alerts are sent.
- `server_id` (String) The ID of the server the stack runs on.
- `swarm_id` (String) The ID of the swarm the stack runs on.
- `webhook` (Attributes) Webhook configuration for the stack. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--stacks--webhook))

<a id="nestedatt--stacks--files"></a>
### Nested Schema for `stacks.files`

Read-Only:

- `contents` (String) Inline compose file contents.
- `directory` (String) Directory to `cd` into before running `docker compose up`.
- `local_enabled` (Boolean) Whether compose files are sourced from the host filesystem.
- `paths` (List of String) Paths to compose files relative to `directory`.

<a id="nestedatt--stacks--environment"></a>
### Nested Schema for `stacks.environment`

Read-Only:

- `file_path` (String) Relative path for the written env file.
- `variables` (Map of String) Environment variables injected.

<a id="nestedatt--stacks--source"></a>
### Nested Schema for `stacks.source`

Read-Only:

- `account_id` (String) The git account used for private repositories.
- `branch` (String) The branch checked out.
- `commit` (String) The specific commit hash checked out.
- `path` (String) The repository path, e.g. `owner/repo`.
- `reclone_enforced` (Boolean) Whether the repo folder is deleted and recloned instead of `git pull`.
- `repo_id` (String) Id or name of the linked Komodo Repo resource.
- `url` (String) The URL of the git provider, e.g. `https://github.com`.

<a id="nestedatt--stacks--post_deploy"></a>
### Nested Schema for `stacks.post_deploy`

Read-Only:

- `command` (String) The shell command to run.
- `path` (String) The working directory for the command.

<a id="nestedatt--stacks--pre_deploy"></a>
### Nested Schema for `stacks.pre_deploy`

Read-Only:

- `command` (String) The shell command to run.
- `path` (String) The working directory for the command.

<a id="nestedatt--stacks--webhook"></a>
### Nested Schema for `stacks.webhook`

Read-Only:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether incoming webhooks trigger a deployment.
- `force_deploy` (Boolean) Whether the webhook always runs `DeployStack` instead of `DeployStackIfChanged`.
- `secret` (String) Alternate webhook secret.

<a id="nestedatt--stacks--build"></a>
### Nested Schema for `stacks.build`

Read-Only:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether `docker compose build` is run before deploying.
- `extra_arguments` (List of String) Extra arguments appended to `docker compose build`.

<a id="nestedatt--stacks--registry"></a>
### Nested Schema for `stacks.registry`

Read-Only:

- `account` (String) Registry account used to login before deploying.
- `provider` (String) Registry provider domain used to `docker login` before deploying.
